title: Road Decay System
description: Roads have maintenance costs that scale with efficiency. Road efficiency decays over time - paved can degrade to gravel over ~5 years if not maintained. Knowing when to maintain vs let roads go fallow is an important economic decision.
definition-of-done: Roads decay over time without maintenance. Decay rate depends on road type. Maintenance prevents or reverses decay. Economic model for maintenance costs.
testing-plan: Verify roads decay at correct rates. Test maintenance prevents decay. Verify decay transitions (paved to gravel). Test maintenance cost calculations.
todos: Implement decay timer per road segment
Create decay rate per road type
